From the retrieved document, `oraext:left-trim()` is used as follows:

oraext:left-trim()---to remove space from left oraext:left-trim (inputfield) number()---to convert string to numeric number(inputfield) string()---to convert numeric to string string(inputfield) xp20:subtract-dayTimeDuration-from-dateTime ()----days substract to date having format YYYY-MM-DD xp20:subtract-dayTimeDuration-fr
